
## Featured Projects 

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-4}
### Rohlik Sales Forecasting
Forecasting warehouse sales using feature engineering and LightGBM.

[Read more](projects/rohlik_sales_prediction.qmd)
:::

::: {.g-col-4}
### House Price Prediction
Predicting house prices using an advanced linear regression approach.

[Read more](projects/house_price_prediction.qmd)
:::

::: {.g-col-4}
### Iris Dataset Analysis
Exploratory analysis and classification of the classic Iris dataset.

[Read more](projects/iris_analysis.qmd)
:::

::: {.g-col-4}
### Chocolate Sales Analysis
Statistical analysis with Power BI and ML

[Read more](projects/chocolate_sales/chocolate_sales.qmd)
:::

::: {.g-col-4}
### Inventory Management App
Web application for managing inventory.

[Read more](projects/inventory_management_app.qmd)
:::

::: {.g-col-4}
### Weather Data Pipeline
Automated pipeline for collecting and storing weather data from APIs.

[Read more](projects/about_pipeline.qmd)
:::

:::
